title: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Accelerates AI Journey from POC to Production with New Solution for AI Development and Training at Scale
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE: HPE) today announced that it is removing barriers for enterprises to easily build and train machine learning models at scale, to realize value faster, with the new HPE Machine Learning Development System. The new system, which is purpose-built for AI, is an end-to-end solution that integrates a machine learning software platform, compute, accelerators, and networking to develop and train more accurate AI models faster, and at scale. title: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Ushers in Next Era in AI Innovation with Swarm Learning Solution Built for the Edge and Distributed Sites
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE: HPE) today announced the launch of HPE Swarm Learning, a breakthrough AI solution to accelerate insights at the edge, from diagnosing diseases to detecting credit card fraud, by sharing and unifying AI model learnings without compromising data privacy. title: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Accelerates RAN Deployments with Automation and Simplified Management for both Open and Traditional Networks
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE: HPE) today announced HPE RAN Automation, a service management and orchestration solution that provides multi-vendor management and automation for any Radio Access Network (RAN) and helps communications service providers increase operational efficiency and accelerate deployment. title: HPE's Cloud Storage Platform Selected by Israel's Ituran
text: Hewlett Packard's (HPE) cloud storage solution, Alletra, has been selected by Israel-based telematics company, Ituran, to enhance real-time data access and vehicle telemetry data analysis in Brazil.

title: Titan Space Technologies Announces Successful Deployment of Machine Learning Models During Historic Ax-1 Mission
text: PALO ALTO, Calif. , April 11, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Titan Space Technologies has successfully deployed and run a suite of machine learning models on the HPE Spaceborne Computer-2, an edge computing and AI system aboard the International Space Station (ISS), in support of Axiom Space's future missions and vision of smart spacecraft architectures.

title: Leading Telematics Company, Ituran, Selects HPE Cloud Native Storage to Improve Real-time Data Access for Clients
text: SÃO PAULO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE: HPE) today announced that Ituran, a global vehicle monitoring and telemetry company headquartered in Israel, has selected HPE Alletra cloud-native data infrastructure to host all vehicle telemetry data for its business in Brazil. The new data services solution enables Ituran to provide its clients with real-time access to vehicle data, to improve automation, decision-making, and business operations. title: HPE's GreenLake to Optimize Auckland's Public Transport System
text: Hewlett Packard Enterprise's (HPE) edge-to-cloud platform, GreenLake, has been selected by Auckland Transport to help the agency optimize public transport in New Zealand's biggest city.

title: Is Hewlett Packard (HPE) a Good Bet Amid Market Uncertainties?

title: City University of Hong Kong Advances Scientific Research with Up to 10X Faster High Performance Computing Cluster from Hewlett Packard Enterprise
text: HONG KONG--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE: HPE) today announced that it has built a new high performance computing (HPC) cluster for the City University of Hong Kong (CityU), one of the world's leading universities, to bolster scientific research and accelerate innovation. title: Auckland Transport Adopts HPE GreenLake for Advanced Analytics to Promote Public Safety
text: AUCKLAND, New Zealand--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE: HPE) today announced that Auckland Transport has selected HPE GreenLake edge-to-cloud platform to deliver an AI-enhanced video feed to optimize transport routes, promote public transportation, and support decision-making for law enforcement. title: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Drives Innovation at the Extreme Edge on the International Space Station with 24 Completed Experiments
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE: HPE) today announced that the HPE Spaceborne Computer-2 (SBC-2), the first in-space commercial edge computing and AI-enabled system to run on the International Space Station (ISS), has successfully completed 24 research experiments, accelerating time-to-insight from months and days, to minutes.
